untranslatable_reason: Signal requires pattern recognition (Double Top with two peaks A and B, confirmation line, two sell trendlines intersection) and cross-sectional industry peer comparison logic that cannot be expressed with single-instrument technical indicators. Requires: (1) explicit peak detection and labeling, (2) trendline drawing and intersection calculation, (3) multi-stock relative performance comparison. These are chart-level pattern features, not quantitative indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price reversal and moving average crossover as proxy for downward turn, but core logic (double top pattern, trendline intersections, industry peer analysis) is untranslatable within single-stock indicator constraints. Recommend implementing as custom pattern recognition module or multi-stock relative strength rule.
